  • Constructor Details

    • TacletFindModel

      public TacletFindModel(TacletApp app, Services services, NamespaceSet nss, AbbrevMap scm, Goal goal)
      Create new data model for tree.
      Parameters:
      app - the TacletApp where to get the necessary entries
      services - services.
      nss - universal namespace of variables, minimum for input in a row.
      scm - the abbreviation map.
      goal - the current goal.

    • createTacletAppFromVarInsts

      public TacletApp createTacletAppFromVarInsts() throws SVInstantiationException
      Returns:
      new rule app with all inserted instantiations in the variable instantiations table
      Throws:
      SVInstantiationException - if the instantiation is incorrect
